title: Book Review: ‘Brawler,’ by Lauren Groff
description: The best stories in “Brawler” find the writer tackling the tectonic shifts that can suddenly crack open seemingly secure families.
hook: Lauren Groff's stories reveal how sudden tectonic shifts crack open seemingly secure families with devastating precision.

title: Mary Gaitskill on Damage and Defiance
description: The author discusses her story “Something Familiar.”
hook: Mary Gaitskill on damage and defiance: a master of complex interiority dissects human vulnerability and resilience.

title: Hunting for the World’s Most Mythical Cannabis: Big Sur Holy Weed
description: "California is racing to save iconic cannabis strains before legalization kills them."
hook: Tracing California's rarest cannabis strains as legalization threatens to erase underground agricultural mythology and culture.
